title: Custom PCB Design & Prototyping
description: Multi-layer schematic capture, board routing, signal integrity verification, and small-batch prototype assembly.

title: Embedded Firmware Optimization
description: Debugging timing issues, power consumption analysis, driver design, and peripheral optimizations for low-power microcontrollers.

title: IoT Cloud Integration & Dashboards
description: Connecting nodes over MQTT/CoAP protocols to AWS IoT Core, Azure IoT, or custom cloud data pipelines with live WebSockets visualizers.
